Authorization"}], "description": "A MantisBT user having *$g_update_bug_threshold* (UPDATER by default) can change an Issue's Status via REST and SOAP API, even if the *$g_set_status_threshold* config is set to a higher level (DEVELOPER by default).

### Impact
Unauthorized change in Issue workflow.

### Patches
https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/releases/tag/release-2.28.4

### Workarounds
None

### Resources
- https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37181
